Why These Apps

Crafted for the Details
Others Ignore.

Every decision — from layout to performance — is made with Fire device users in mind.

📴
Fully Offline

All content is bundled locally. No Wi-Fi needed after download — perfect for travel, low-signal areas, or just getting things done fast.

🎙️
Built-in Voice Playback

Hear commands spoken naturally so you know exactly how to phrase them — no more guessing what Alexa will understand.

⚡
Instant Keyword Search

Find any command in milliseconds across the full library — no waiting, no lag, no friction between you and the answer.

🏠
Smart Home Coverage

Deep Smart Home section covering lights, locks, thermostats, cameras, blinds, and 30+ compatible device types.

🔥
Fire TV Optimised

Leanback-compliant navigation, voice remote support, D-pad compatibility — designed natively for the big-screen experience.

⭐
Save Your Favourites

Bookmark the commands you actually use so they're always one tap away — no hunting through lists every session.

About Rajmane

Focused Apps.
Genuine Quality.

Rajmane builds focused, high-performance apps for Amazon Fire devices. Every app is designed from the ground up for the Fire ecosystem — optimised layouts, offline-first architecture, and tight integration with Fire TV and Fire Tablet hardware.

No bloat. No generic cross-platform ports. Just apps that do exactly what they say — fast, reliably, and without getting in the way.
